``` ::: ::: ::: {.panel-tabset .nav-pills} # Parole Eligibility ## How Parole Eligibility is Determined As a general rule, sentences for nonviolent and lower-level violent and sex offenses are eligible at one-third mark of the judicial maximum sentence or nine months whichever is longer. Application of credits ranging from 72 to 192 days per year can reduce eligibility to 25 percent.
## In Prison Past Their Parole Eligibility Year In 2020, there were people in prison past their parole eligibility year. This group made up of people in prison for new crimes and with sentence lengths between 1 to 25 years. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

# Prison Population ## Prison Population Trends From 2010 to 2022, the prison population decreased 50%, changing from 25,007 in 2010 to 12,506 in 2022. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: Source: BJS Prisoners Series

# Prison Releases ## Prison Release Trends From 2010 to 2018, prison releases decreased 35%, dropping from 12,128 in 2010 to 7,847 in 2018. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::
::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::
## Conditional Releases Conditional release involves an individual’s release under specific conditions and supervision, whereas unconditional release means the individual is released without further obligations or restrictions. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::

``` ::: :::
# Disparities ## Incarceration Rates In New Jersey, Black, non-Hispanic people are incarcerated in state prison at a rate 13.1 times higher and Hispanic, any race people are incarcerated in state prison at a rate 2.2 times higher than White, non-Hispanic people, when accounting for population sizes in the community. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

## Timing of Release After Parole Eligibility The timing of release for individuals after their parole eligibility year varied by offense type and demographic group, with many remaining in prison for several years beyond their eligibility date. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
